steps.title: Use the scale clue
steps.content: The passage describes the Al-Rahman Grand Mosque as massive and says it can hold about 17,000 people at once. The blank needs a word for the visual effect of that great size.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content: A means perfected or idealized, B means complex in detail, and C means deceptive or unreal. Those do not fit a real, massive mosque. The fitting word means commanding and impressive because of size. The answer is D.
